text_en: I am very good at identifying the emotions I am feeling.
text_zh: 我能精准捕捉并识别自己当下的情绪状态。

text_en: I am highly aware of how I am feeling (my moods, emotions, etc.).
text_zh: 我对自己的心境和情绪起伏有着极高的敏锐度。

text_en: I use very specific words to talk about how I am feeling.
text_zh: 在表达感受时，我能用非常精准的词汇来描述我的情绪。

text_en: I recognize emotions the moment I feel them.
text_zh: 情绪刚一冒头，我就能立刻察觉到它。

text_en: I find it hard to put how I am feeling into words.
text_zh: 我常常觉得“词不达意”，很难用语言描述清楚自己的感受。

text_en: I describe my emotional experiences vividly.
text_zh: 我能非常生动、细腻地向他人描述我的情感体验。

text_en: I have a rich emotional vocabulary.
text_zh: 我的大脑里有一个非常丰富的“情绪词汇库”。

text_en: I am consistently aware of what kind of mood I'm in.
text_zh: 我总是很清楚自己正处于什么样的心境之中。

text_en: I am good at keeping track of how I'm feeling throughout the day.
text_zh: 在这一整天里，我都能很好地追踪和留意自己的情绪变化。

text_en: I don't really like talking about the way I feel.
text_zh: 我其实很排斥跟别人谈论我的真实感受。

text_en: I often feel confused by what I'm feeling.
text_zh: 我经常对自己产生的情绪感到莫名其妙或一头雾水。

text_en: I understand how my feelings influence my behavior.
text_zh: 我深知自己的情绪是如何在暗中影响我的行为和决定的。

text_en: When I get up in the morning, I consciously reflect on how I feel.
text_zh: 每天早晨醒来，我会有意识地去感知一下自己今天的状态和心情。

text_en: Talking about how I am feeling usually improves my mood.
text_zh: 把心里的感受倾诉出来，通常能让我心情舒畅不少。

text_en: I pay little attention to my emotions when there is a job to be done.
text_zh: 一旦手头有事要忙，我几乎完全顾不上照顾自己的情绪。

text_en: I have control over my emotions.
text_zh: 我有能力驾驭自己的情绪。

text_en: My emotions are under control.
text_zh: 我的情绪通常都在我的掌控范围之内。

text_en: I often get caught up in the heat of the moment.
text_zh: 遇到突发情况时，我经常会“上头”或者被情绪冲昏头脑。

text_en: I move on very quickly from negative emotions and bad moods.
text_zh: 遇到不开心的事情，我能很快从负面情绪中“翻篇”。

text_en: Once something upsets me, I find it hard to calm myself back down.
text_zh: 一旦有什么事惹恼了我，我很难让自己迅速平复下来。

text_en: My moods rarely affect my decisions.
text_zh: 我的决策很少会被一时的情绪波动所左右。

text_en: I am sometimes overwhelmed by my emotions.
text_zh: 我有时会被排山倒海的情绪彻底淹没，感到无所适从。

text_en: I often can't go about my day because of the emotions I am feeling.
text_zh: 我经常因为情绪太糟糕，导致一整天什么事都干不下去。

text_en: I find it easy to cheer myself up when I am feeling sad or unmotivated.
text_zh: 感到低落或提不起劲的时候，我总有办法让自己重新振作起来。

text_en: I don't let myself get carried away with my feelings.
text_zh: 我不会任由自己被情绪牵着鼻子走。

text_en: I control my emotions; my emotions don't control me.
text_zh: 是我在控制情绪，而不是情绪在控制我。

text_en: I rarely get angry.
text_zh: 我极少发火或暴怒。

text_en: I stay calm under stress.
text_zh: 即使在巨大的压力下，我也能保持镇定自若。

text_en: In the heat of the moment, I sometimes say or do things I later regret.
text_zh: 在气头上时，我偶尔会说出或做出让自己事后懊悔不已的事情。

text_en: I am impulsive by nature.
text_zh: 骨子里，我是一个容易冲动行事的人。

text_en: I sometimes find it hard to figure out how people around me are feeling.
text_zh: 我有时真的搞不懂身边的人到底在想什么、感觉如何。

text_en: I am very good at reading body language.
text_zh: 我非常擅长捕捉和解读他人的肢体语言。

text_en: I have an acute sense of how people around me are feeling.
text_zh: 对于周围人的情绪变化，我有着极强的嗅觉和洞察力。

text_en: I am easily upset by the pain of other people.
text_zh: 看到别人遭受痛苦，我也会感同身受地觉得非常难过。

text_en: I am very good at reading nonverbal cues.
text_zh: 我很擅长解读那些“只可意会不可言传”的非语言暗示。

text_en: I often feel compelled to act when I see someone suffering.
text_zh: 看到别人陷入困境时，我总是忍不住想要出手相助。

text_en: I can often tell how people feel just by looking at them.
text_zh: 很多时候，我只需看人一眼，就能猜透他们的心思。

text_en: I am a very empathetic person.
text_zh: 我是一个共情能力极强的人，很容易和别人产生共鸣。

text_en: I understand a lot just from other people's facial expressions.
text_zh: 单靠观察别人的微表情，我就能读懂很多潜在的信息。

text_en: I can tell if someone is upset without them having to say anything.
text_zh: 就算对方什么都不说，我也能敏锐地察觉到他的失落或不悦。

text_en: I am good at understanding how people feel, even when they don't say so out loud.
text_zh: 即使别人把心事藏在肚子里，我也能精准地体会到他们的感受。

text_en: I sometimes find other people hard to read.
text_zh: 我有时觉得别人就像一本难懂的书，完全猜不透。

text_en: I am very concerned about poverty and injustice in the world.
text_zh: 我对这个世界上的贫困和不公现象感到深深的关切。

text_en: I am not moved by other people's tragic stories.
text_zh: 别人的悲惨遭遇很难触动我，我通常没什么波澜。

text_en: I can easily empathize with others' feelings.
text_zh: 我能毫不费力地站到别人的立场去体会他们的喜怒哀乐。

text_en: I really enjoy socializing.
text_zh: 我发自内心地享受与人打交道的社交场合。

text_en: I am confident in social situations.
text_zh: 在社交场合中，我总是表现得游刃有余、充满自信。

text_en: I consider myself to be charming.
text_zh: 我认为自己是一个有吸引力、自带气场的人。

text_en: I am very good at getting people to laugh.
text_zh: 我是个“气氛组选手”，总能轻易把别人逗乐。

text_en: I have very good social skills.
text_zh: 我具备非常出色的人际交往手腕。

text_en: I am a very persuasive person.
text_zh: 我具有很强的说服力，很容易让别人接受我的观点。

text_en: I don't really like networking.
text_zh: 我其实很反感那种刻意逢迎的功利性社交（Networking）。

text_en: I try not to draw attention to myself.
text_zh: 在人群中，我总是尽量降低存在感，不想引起别人的注意。

text_en: I bring fun and excitement to social gatherings.
text_zh: 只要有我在的聚会，绝对少不了欢乐和高潮。

text_en: I really enjoy getting to know people better.
text_zh: 我对深度了解别人充满热情，喜欢和人建立真实的连接。

text_en: I have valuable friendships that I enjoy.
text_zh: 我拥有几段让我倍感珍惜和享受的高质量友谊。

text_en: I feel shy in social interactions.
text_zh: 在和人打交道时，我常常会觉得有些局促和害羞。

text_en: I enjoy working together with others.
text_zh: 我非常享受和团队成员并肩作战、协同配合的感觉。

text_en: I am a good listener.
text_zh: 我是一个绝佳的倾听者，别人都愿意对我敞开心扉。

text_en: Other people see me as a warm and kind person.
text_zh: 在别人眼里，我是一个非常有温度、随和友善的人。
